fields.explainZh: 节点ID。
fields.explainEn: ID of a node.

fields.explainZh: 节点IP地址和节点通讯端口。
fields.explainEn: IP address and communication port number of a node.

fields.explainZh: CPU加载数量。
fields.explainEn: Number of CPU loads.

fields.explainZh: 节点处理权重。
fields.explainEn: Processing weight of a node.

fields.explainZh: 节点主存储数，即当前节点提供读写服务的存储。
fields.explainEn: Number of primary storage blocks of a node, which specifies the number of storage blocks that provide read-write services on the node.

fields.explainZh: 节点状态。
fields.explainEn: State of a node.

fields.explainZh: 节点类型。
fields.explainEn: Type of a node.

fields.explainZh: 节点总存储数，即当前节点的主存储和其他节点副本存储的总和。
fields.explainEn: Number of storage blocks of nodes, which specifies the number of primary blocks of the current node and the number of replica storage blocks on the other nodes.

fields.explainZh: 节点存储权重。
fields.explainEn: Storage weight of a node.

fields.explainZh: 节点缓存块大小。
fields.explainEn: Cache block size of a node.

fields.explainZh: 节点脏数据缓存数。
fields.explainEn: Number of dirty cache blocks of a node.

fields.explainZh: 节点可用缓存数。
fields.explainEn: Number of free cache blocks of a node.

fields.explainZh: 节点可用SGA（系统全局区）数。
fields.explainEn: Number of available system global area (SGA) blocks of a node.

fields.explainZh: 节点LRU（最近最少使用）缓存数。
fields.explainEn: Number of least recently used (LRU) cache blocks of a node.

fields.explainZh: 节点ID。
fields.explainEn: ID of a node.

fields.explainZh: 节点IP。
fields.explainEn: IP of a node.

fields.explainZh: 节点峰值SGA（系统全局区）数。
fields.explainEn: Number of peak system global area (SGA) blocks of a node.

fields.explainZh: 节点SGA（系统全局区）块大小。
fields.explainEn: Size of a system global area (SGA) block of a node.

fields.explainZh: 节点总缓存数。
fields.explainEn: Total number of cache blocks of a node.

fields.explainZh: 节点总SGA（系统全局区）数。
fields.explainEn: Total number of system global area (SGA) blocks of a node.

fields.explainZh: IOM连接到虚谷数据库并返回响应的时间。
fields.explainEn: Time taken for IOM to connect to the Xugu database and return a response.

fields.explainZh: 自数据库启动节点缓存读取次数总和。
fields.explainEn: Total number of cache reads from a node since the database started up.

fields.explainZh: 最近一个采集间隔时间内节点每秒缓存读取次数。
fields.explainEn: Number of cache reads from a node per second within the last sampling interval.

fields.explainZh: 节点服务器当前时间与2010年1月1日的差值，单位为秒。
fields.explainEn: Time difference (in seconds) between the current time on the node server and January 1st, 2010.

fields.explainZh: 节点服务器当前时间。
fields.explainEn: Current time of the node server.

fields.explainZh: 自数据库启动节点死锁次数总和。
fields.explainEn: Total number of deadlocks on a node since the database started up.

fields.explainZh: 自数据库启动节点磁盘读取大小总和。
fields.explainEn: Total size of data read from disks on a node since the database started up.

fields.explainZh: 最近一个采集间隔时间内节点每秒磁盘读取大小。
fields.explainEn: Size of data read from disks per second on a node within the last sampling interval.

fields.explainZh: 自数据库启动节点磁盘读取次数总和。
fields.explainEn: Total number of disk reads from a node since the database started up.

fields.explainZh: 最近一个采集间隔时间内节点每秒磁盘读取次数。
fields.explainEn: Number of disk reads from a node per second within the last sampling interval.

fields.explainZh: 自数据库启动节点磁盘写入大小总和。
fields.explainEn: Total size of data written to disks on a node since the database started up.

fields.explainZh: 最近一个采集间隔时间内节点每秒磁盘写入大小。
fields.explainEn: Size of data written to disks per second on a node within the last sampling interval.

fields.explainZh: 自数据库启动节点磁盘写入次数总和。
fields.explainEn: Total number of disk writes to a node since the database started up.

fields.explainZh: 最近一个采集间隔时间内节点每秒磁盘写入次数。
fields.explainEn: Number of disk writes to a node per second within the last sampling interval.

fields.explainZh: 自数据库启动节点锁请求次数总和。
fields.explainEn: Total number of lock requests on a node since the database started up.

fields.explainZh: 自数据库启动节点网络读取大小总和。
fields.explainEn: Total size of data read from the network on a node since the database started up.

fields.explainZh: 最近一个采集间隔时间内节点每秒网络读取大小。
fields.explainEn: Size of data read from the network per second on a node within the last sampling interval.

fields.explainZh: 自数据库启动节点网络写入大小总和。
fields.explainEn: Total size of data written to the network on a node since the database started up.

fields.explainZh: 最近一个采集间隔时间内节点每秒网络写入大小。
fields.explainEn: Size of data written to the network per second on a node within the last sampling interval.

fields.explainZh: 自数据库启动节点消息接收次数总和。
fields.explainEn: Total number of messages received on a node since the database started up.

fields.explainZh: 自数据库启动节点收到请求次数总和。
fields.explainEn: Total number of requests received on a node since the database started up.

fields.explainZh: 最近一个采集间隔时间内节点每秒收到请求次数。
fields.explainEn: Number of requests received on a node per second within the last sampling interval.

fields.explainZh: 节点ID。
fields.explainEn: ID of a node.

fields.explainZh: 自数据库启动节点消息发送次数总和?。
fields.explainEn: Total number of messages sent on a node since the database started up.

fields.explainZh: 用户最后修改时间。
fields.explainEn: Last time when a user was modified.

fields.explainZh: 用户是否锁定，在解锁前该用户不能登录虚谷数据库，值为T表示已锁定，值为F表示未锁定。
fields.explainEn: Whether a user is locked.The user cannot log in to the Xugu database until it is unlocked.The value of T means locked, and the value of F means unlocked.

fields.explainZh: 用户角色。
fields.explainEn: Role of a user.

fields.explainZh: 用户创建时间。
fields.explainEn: Time when a user was created.

fields.explainZh: 用户所属数据库。
fields.explainEn: Database to which a user belongs.

fields.explainZh: 用户ID。
fields.explainEn: ID of a user.

fields.explainZh: 用户的ID及所属数据库。
fields.explainEn: ID and database of a user.

fields.explainZh: 用户名称。
fields.explainEn: Name of a user.

fields.explainZh: 测试IP对应资源的协议连接。
fields.explainEn: Test the protocol connections of the resource corresponding to an IP address.
